refnamediv.refpurpose: Checks if a geometry has an M (measure) dimension.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Checks if the input geometry has an M (measure) dimension and returns a boolean value. If the geometry has an M dimension, it returns true; otherwise, it returns false.
Geometry objects with an M dimension typically represent measurements or additional data associated with spatial features.
This function is useful for determining if a geometry includes measure information.
